sections.heading: Agent
items: Attach project media directly from the composer.
Workflow starters no longer appear as messages you typed.
Existing chat sessions remain compatible with the updated transcript format.

sections.heading: Format packs
items: The active format now has a visible workspace identity and accent.
Music Video uses clearer starter copy and human-readable phase names.

sections.heading: New
items: New export_project tool - Agent can now export videos for you.
New remove_words tool - Agent can now read your timeline, and remove filler words.

sections.heading: UI
items: Change project settings in the inspector panel - edit fps, resolution, and aspect ratio.
